points: Built 6+ production web apps from zero, handling database design, UI polish, and deployment.
Shipped React, Vite, Supabase, and GraphQL workflows for fast product prototypes.
Documented build decisions through case studies and technical blog posts.
Built a GitHub repo health scorer for developers looking for high-quality open source projects.
Reduced repeated GitHub API calls with a 6-hour cache strategy and edge-function data shaping.
Designed beginner-friendly filters to make contribution discovery faster and less noisy.
Created anime-inspired AI visuals, edits, and 3D direction for the DarkWing brand.
Built a reusable visual language across portfolio, project thumbnails, and social content.
Directed UI motion and cinematic art direction without sacrificing page performance.
